title: MTR Decoration Expansion 地铁装饰扩展
description: Add screendoor hanging panel and many items for MTR Mod
body:
**Depend on FangSu Blocks and MTR ANTE! Download them in following links.
** **依赖方速·方块包和ANTE! 请在下面的链接下载这些依赖.
** **https://modrinth.com/project/FFliJzpM
** **https://modrinth.com/project/ybOYitTg
** ## English description
English description MTR Extension Based on ANTE & FangSu Blocks Provide Hangzhou Metro and Suzhou Metro theme hanging panel
## 简中简介
Chinese (Simplified) description 基于ANTE和方速方块包 的MTR扩展. 包含杭州地铁和苏州地铁风格吊板.
